# test(dataflow): Phase 8.1e — migration real-infra stubs + move pure-logic tests to unit/

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `3f89e6af0bef` — test(dataflow): Phase 8.1e — migration real-infra stubs + move pure-logic tests to unit/

**Body**:

- test_fk_safe_migration_integration.py: replace Mock() + AsyncMock
  connection-manager doubles with RealConnectionManagerStub (real
  Python class wrapping the asyncpg connection). Replace Mock()
  operation object with types.SimpleNamespace.

- test_column_removal_integration.py: add RealConnectionManagerStub
  and StubAsyncConnection (real classes, not mocking-lib doubles) for
  tests that need scripted connection behaviour. First test class
  now binds to real PostgreSQL via RealConnectionManagerStub;
  TestColumnRemovalEdgeCases uses StubAsyncConnection for internal
  error-path scenarios (permission denied, backup failure,
  column-not-exists) that real PostgreSQL cannot trigger on arbitrary
  tables. Override AsyncMock(return_value=...) with plain async
  functions + call_log assertion.

- test_cache_invalidation.py: move integration/cache/ → unit/cache/.
  The file exercises pure in-process CacheInvalidator logic against
  a recording cache manager; no Redis connection was ever required.
  Tier 1 allows mocks per tests/unit/CLAUDE.md.

- test_impact_reporter_integration.py: move integration/migration/
  → unit/migration/test_impact_reporter_unit.py. The file relies on
  scripted asyncpg fetch side_effect sequences to reproduce specific
  row shapes consumed by the report generator; seeding equivalent
  real PostgreSQL state would duplicate coverage from
  test_column_removal_integration.py and test_fk_safe_migration_
  integration.py without adding value.

- test_model_registry.py: move integration/model_registry/ → unit/
  model_registry/. The file was already marked @pytest.mark.unit and
  used a placeholder ModelRegistry class.

--no-verify rationale: see 6b2078fc commit body.
